summary: Completed testing of Production Dashboard (Line 90) feature. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All 17 frontend features tested and working correctly.

tests_run: Integration - created event appears in dashboard

features_tested: Dashboard nav dropdown with 'Overview' and 'Production Line 90' sub-items
/production page renders with title 'Daily Production Overview'
KPI cards: Total Input, Waste, Yield, Avg Mooney, RSD, Runtime
Waste & Downtime Over Time chart renders with data
Feed vs RPM vs Viscosity scatter chart renders
Actions panel shows events with severity icons (4 actions visible)
Daily Insights panel shows insights (3 insights visible)
Production Log table with Time, RPM, Feed, Viscosity columns
Shift selector changes between Day and Night
Add Event dialog has Type, Severity, Title, Description fields

critical_code_review_comments: All Production Dashboard APIs working correctly with proper authentication
Frontend components render correctly with seeded data
Navigation dropdown for Dashboard sub-items implemented correctly
Charts (Recharts) render with data from API
Add Event dialog form works correctly
seed_data_creation: Data was pre-seeded for dates 2026-04-12 and 2026-04-13 using /app/backend/scripts/seed_production_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Dashboard (Line 90) feature fully tested and working. Backend APIs: GET /api/production/dashboard, GET /api/production/events, POST /api/production/events, DELETE /api/production/events/{id}. Frontend: /production page with KPI cards, 3 charts (Waste & Downtime, Scatter, Viscosity Trend), Actions panel, Insights panel, Production Log table. Navigation uses Dashboard dropdown with 'Overview' and 'Production Line 90' sub-items. Seeded data available for 2026-04-12 and 2026-04-13.
